ASR Tactical Kwaiken Blade Full Tang Knife with Slim Kydex Sheath 8.5“ Black

The ASR Tactical Kwaiken style knife is a great option for self-defense in indoor spaces. With a blade of just 3.5” in length and an overall length of 8.5”, it can easily fit inside of a pocket, backpack, or purse for quick deployment.

Key Features

  • KWAIKEN STYLE BLADE – Primarily used for self-defense in indoor spaces, the Kwaiken style blade is ideal for those who are looking for a blade that can easily be stored in a pocket or small space.
  • FULL TANG FIXED KNIFE – Our full tang fixed blade knife is made of one solid piece of metal that constitutes the blade and runs down the handle as well, making it incredibly sturdy and durable.
  • COMPACT SIZE – The blade itself measures 3.5” and the overall length is 8.5” so you can store it in small spaces like pockets, backpacks, bags or purses.
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION – Made of heavy duty 3CR13 stainless steel that won’t rust, this knife is great for using indoors or outdoors, rain or shine. The handle is made of durable ABS impact plastic.
  • KYDEX SHEATH – The ASR Tactical knife comes with a sturdy black slim Kydex sheath and tools so you can affix it to your pocket or belt.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: HWT268BK
  • UPC: 810058483843

Our full tang blade features a black ABS impact plastic handle and comes with a sturdy black Kydex sheath so you can store the blade safely when not in use. The blade itself is constructed of heavy-duty stainless steel so you don’t need to worry about it rusting, making it great for outdoor use too.

This blade is a must-have tactical and self-defense tool for anyone who values their safety either indoors or outdoors! Its decorative design also makes it a great gift for knife collectors and enthusiasts.
